title: 2000x leverage with Opt Fun on Hyperliquid
summary_title: OptFun's 1000X leverage: Bitcoin options in one minute on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Ryan explains why OptFun chose Hyperliquid, how 1000X leverage works fairly, and what 84M volume in week one means.

key_moments.label: OptFun thesis: fair degen venue vs Pump Fun insider cabal
Ryan intro: OptFun is 1000X Bitcoin options, one minute expiry, on Hyperliquid EVM
Why Hyperliquid: devoted traders, fast shipping team, fair ecosystem (no VC dumps)
50M (now 84M) volume in first week despite zero outreach from core team
Technical: on-chain order book, high-performance RPCs, one-minute settlement, clean UX
Strategy tip: place trades 30-60s into cycle, look at prior minute momentum
Future: HIP3 enables any asset (stocks, commodities, meme coins) at 1000X+
Biggest win seen: 15X return in one minute; exploring auto-roll and time variants

pull_quote: If you keep doubling your bet, at some point you'll win and bail out all losses, but that number gets very big very fast.
